content.decision: Created GitHub org 'momhq'. Transferred repo from vmarinogg/leo-core to momhq/mom. Go module path changed from github.com/vmarinogg/leo-core/cli to github.com/momhq/mom/cli.
content.why: Professional branding, clean URLs, Homebrew tap under org (momhq/tap). Done before v0.10 public release to avoid breaking links and module paths later.
details: Org name 'momhq' chosen after mom, mother, askmom were taken
GitHub transfer preserves issues, PRs, milestones, stars, creates redirect
All Go imports, Makefile ldflags, Formula URLs, docs URLs updated
